title: Unified Movement Sync Architecture (P2)
supersedes: Movement Sync Architecture Rework (P1) — US-A/B/C/D completed in commit dde4955 + da1c150
strategy: Extract triplicated step algorithm into single-source-of-truth movement_core crate; introduce MovementMode state machine; align remote interp with Valve 2001 default (150ms); no novel algorithm.

stories.title: movement_core crate skeleton with unified types
acceptanceCriteria: apps/scene_server/native/movement_core/Cargo.toml 存在，crate-type = ["rlib"]，无 rustler/tokio 等 runtime 依赖
movement_core::MovementProfile 字段 (max_speed, max_accel, max_decel, max_jerk, friction, turn_response, fixed_dt_ms, max_speed_scale) 全 f64，Default 产生 220/1200/1400/9000/0/1.0/100/1.0
movement_core::InputFrame 包含 seq u32 / client_tick u32 / dt_ms u16 / input_dir [f64;2] / speed_scale f64 / movement_flags u16 / movement_mode MovementMode
movement_core::MovementState 包含 position/velocity/acceleration [f64;3] / movement_mode / tick u32 / seq u32
movement_core::MovementMode 枚举 Grounded/Airborne/Scripted/Disabled (critic-revised: 保留现有 3 变体零重命名, 新增 Scripted)，Default = Grounded
movement_core::MovementAck 字段 ack_seq u32 / auth_tick u32 / position/velocity/acceleration / movement_mode / correction_flags u32
cargo build -p movement_core 退出码 0
cargo test -p movement_core 包含 ≥3 个 sanity 测试且全绿 (profile default / mode default / state idle round-trip)

stories.title: Authoritative integrator + MovementMode dispatch
acceptanceCriteria: movement_core::integrator::step(state, input, profile) 实现 jerk-limited kinematics，与当前 clients/bevy_client/src/sim/predictor.rs::step 语义 bit-exact
step 按 state.movement_mode 分派到 walking_step / scripted_step / disabled_step
walking_step 完整移植 velocity_error → accel_limit → smooth_acceleration → velocity → position 流程
scripted_step 不改变 position/velocity/acceleration，仅推进 tick/seq
disabled_step 将 velocity/acceleration 归零，position 不变
movement_core::integrator::replay(anchor, inputs, profile) -> Vec<MovementState> 迭代 step，与现 NIF replay 语义一致
cargo test -p movement_core 含 ≥8 个测试且全绿 (walking accel/brake/turn/jerk-clamp、scripted no-op、disabled zero-out、replay multi-step、profile golden)

stories.title: Bevy client switched to movement_core
acceptanceCriteria: clients/bevy_client/Cargo.toml 包含 movement_core = { path = "../../apps/scene_server/native/movement_core" }
sim/predictor.rs::step 内部不再包含 jerk-limit 算法，而是调用 movement_core::integrator::step（可包裹 Bevy Vec ↔ [f64;N] 适配）
sim/profile.rs / sim/types.rs 中的 MovementProfile/InputFrame/MovementState/MovementMode 改为 re-export 或 newtype 包裹 movement_core 同名类型
cd clients/bevy_client && cargo check --all-targets 退出码 0
cd clients/bevy_client && cargo test --lib 退出码 0 (sim:: 与 world:: 现有测试全绿)
scripts/e2e-stdio-movement (ps1 或 sh) 运行成功，reconcile_stats.hard_snaps == 0，max_correction_distance < 16.0

stories.title: Server NIF switched to movement_core
acceptanceCriteria: apps/scene_server/native/movement_engine/Cargo.toml 包含 movement_core = { path = "../movement_core" }
movement_engine/src/integrator.rs 不再包含算法内核，只保留 Rustler term ↔ movement_core 类型的适配
NIF 导出函数签名不变（Elixir 端 NativeMovementEngine.step / replay 调用点无须修改）
cd apps/scene_server/native/movement_engine && cargo build 退出码 0
根目录 mix compile 退出码 0
cd apps/scene_server && mix test --no-start 退出码 0
apps/scene_server/lib/scene_server/movement/integrator.ex 顶部有 @moduledoc 注释标明「参考实现，非运行时路径」

stories.title: Remote interpolator aligned with Valve default
acceptanceCriteria: clients/bevy_client/src/world/remote_player.rs 中 INTERPOLATION_DELAY_SECS == 0.15
同文件 MAX_REMOTE_EXTRAPOLATION_SECS == 0.25
两个常量正上方有注释注明出处 (Valve Source Engine Networking / Bernier 2001)
cargo test --lib world::remote_player 退出码 0 (如有数值断言，需同步更新期望值)

stories.title: Docs + parameter roadmap markers
acceptanceCriteria: movement_core/src/profile.rs 的 Default 实现对 max_speed/max_accel/max_decel/max_jerk 每个字段有注释，标注 Unreal CMC / Valve / MMO 推荐区间及 C 路线备选值
docs/2026-04-20-移动同步架构实现.md 追加「P2 统一架构」章节，包含 crate 拓扑图 + MovementMode 状态机说明 + bit-exact 契约清单
.omc/progress.txt 追加 P2 changelog (提及 movement_core crate、bit-exact golden、remote interp 0.15)

stories.title: Golden reconciliation test across Elixir ↔ NIF
acceptanceCriteria: apps/scene_server/test/scene_server/movement/integrator_golden_test.exs 存在
测试构造 ≥3 条固定输入序列 (直线 / 刹车 / 转向)
对每条序列，Integrator.step (Elixir) 与 Native.MovementEngine.step (NIF→movement_core) 的 position/velocity/acceleration 逐 tick 差异 < 1e-9
cd apps/scene_server && mix test --no-start test/scene_server/movement/integrator_golden_test.exs 退出码 0
